title: Client intent (v13.1+ with V3.3 research_inputs extension)
description: Per-client funnel intent + research_inputs (CRE Fusion, Task #18). Backward compatible: research_inputs section is OPTIONAL. Clients audités en V3.2.1 n'ont pas cette section; clients V3.3 l'enrichissent au fil des audits.

research_inputs.description: V3.3 CRE Fusion (Task #18) — research-first inputs collected from the client. Optional. When present, doctrine V3.3 scorer applies +2 Confidence boost on research_dependent criteria; when absent, applies -2 Confidence penalty.

visitor_surveys.description: Findings from on-site visitor surveys (e.g. Hotjar, Typeform). Each entry is a quote, statistic, or theme.

chat_logs_summary.description: Aggregated themes/quotes from chat support logs (Intercom, Crisp, Zendesk).

support_tickets_themes.description: Top recurring themes/objections from support tickets.

nps_responses_summary.description: Aggregated NPS detractor/passive feedback. Promoter verbatims optional.

voc_verbatims.description: Raw Voice-of-Customer quotes (interviews, reviews, survey open-ended). Used by psy_08 + tone matching across all critères research_dependent.

interview_transcripts.description: URLs or paths to interview transcripts (5-10 customer interviews minimum recommandé par CRE).

heatmaps_summary.description: Aggregated heatmap findings (scroll depth, click maps, attention zones).

session_recordings.description: URLs/IDs of representative session recordings + 1-line annotation per recording.

ad_creative_audit.description: Summary of paid ad creative audit (top 5 ads × their LP landing point). Used by coh_03 (scent matching).

search_query_data.description: Top search queries triggering ad impressions (Google Ads search terms report).

pagespeed_telemetry.description: Real User Monitoring (CrUX, GA4 web vitals) summary.

uptime_logs.description: Reliability metrics (uptime, error rates) — relevant for tech criteria.

last_updated.description: ISO date of last research_inputs refresh.

completeness_pct.description: Pct of research_inputs fields populated. Below 30% → research-first criteria ne peuvent pas être Top.

visitor_surveys: 70% des prospects sont des web devs SaaS B2B intégrant Weglot dans <30min
Top objection : 'is the translation quality good enough for our brand?'

voc_verbatims.quote: I needed something faster than Crowdin
